# attachmentUpdate

Updates an existing issue attachment.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`AttachmentPayload`](../objects/attachment_payload-object.md)!

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| `input` | [`AttachmentUpdateInput`](../input-objects/attachment_update_input-input.md)! | `n/a` | No | A partial attachment object to update the attachment with. |
